props.name: direction
props.description: The scroll direction. Can be "vertical" (default) or "horizontal".

props.name: height
props.description: Sets the height of the panel. Any valid CSS height value (e.g. "400px", "100%", "100vh"). Defaults to "100%". The parent element must establish a height context for "100%" to work.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Content rendered in the sticky footer region.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Content rendered in the sticky header region.

props.name: direction
props.description: Sets the scroll direction. Can be "vertical" or "horizontal". Defaults to "vertical".

props.name: height
props.description: Sets the height of the container. Any valid CSS height value (e.g. "400px", "100%", "100vh"). Defaults to "100%". The parent element must establish a height context for "100%" to work. The value is applied directly to the host element's style.

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

slots.description: Content rendered in the sticky footer region.

slots.description: Content rendered in the sticky header region.
